finding: ARCHITECTURE.md describes the pre-D31 command model: it says the manifest's lens column lets "many commands (/assess-performance, /assess-security, ...) share the one harness body" and "choose assess-<concern>". Since D31 those are one parameterized /assess <concern>; per-concern commands no longer exist.
proposed_action: Rewrite the assess section to describe the single parameterized /assess <concern> command and the assess-<concern> catalog rows (not separate commands); mirror index.md/README.

finding: ARCHITECTURE.md "Invocation, by tool" lists /assess-security as an example command; that command does not exist post-D31.
proposed_action: Replace /assess-security examples with /assess security throughout ARCHITECTURE.md.

finding: ARCHITECTURE.md omits nine of the fifteen workflows entirely: verify, advise (+personas), assess-all, spec, incident, release-notes, migrate, list-workflows, getting-started. It describes only release-review, plan-review, assess, setup-repo, scaffold.
evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md:190-253 (no mention of the D33-D37 workflows)
proposed_action: Add sections for the verification/evidence layer (verify + run_checks.py), the advise persona family, assess-all, the lifecycle workflows, list-workflows, and getting-started.

finding: ARCHITECTURE.md file tree omits the workflow dirs added in D33-D37 (verify/, advise/, assess-all/, spec/, incident/, release-notes/, migrate/, list-workflows/, getting-started/), the VERSION file, the tests/ dir, and the run_checks.py/setup_tools.py tools; the .opencode/.claude tree comments say only "(/release-review[-plan], /plan-review)".
proposed_action: Update the file tree to reflect the current .agents/workflows/ layout, VERSION, tests/, and the three tools.

finding: ARCHITECTURE.md does not mention framework versioning (VERSION file, YYYYMMDD-NN scheme, installer stamping, --version) added in D32, nor the self-test suite (tests/, D36) though it discusses the design elsewhere.
proposed_action: Add a short subsection on versioning + stamping and on the self-tests, cross-referencing DECISIONS D32/D36.

finding: ARCHITECTURE.md describes only scan_secrets.py and setup_tools.py as the tools; run_checks.py (the verify evidence engine, D33) is not listed among the mechanical helpers.
disposition: Add run_checks.py to the tools description alongside scan_secrets.py and setup_tools.py.

finding: CONTRIBUTING.md doc-sync checklist step 3 says "For an assess-* concern, add the lens ..." but does not mention adding an advise-<persona> catalog row for the parallel advise family (same catalog-collapse mechanism).
proposed_action: Generalize step 3 to cover both assess-<concern> lenses and advise-<persona> personas (both catalog rows).

finding: Stray Windows Zone.Identifier metadata file tracked/present next to a prompts/ doc; not documentation content but repo hygiene the docs lens surfaces (clutters the doc tree).
proposed_action: Remove the stray :Zone.Identifier file and add a .gitignore guard (the installer already ignores these in the workflow tree).

finding: No CHANGELOG/release-notes file exists at the repo root; the framework now has a version (20260704-01) and a /release-notes workflow, so a user cannot see what changed between versions. DECISIONS.md is the de-facto history but is design-rationale, not a user-facing changelog.
proposed_action: Consider adding a CHANGELOG.md (or documenting that DECISIONS.md serves that role and pointing to it from README). Low priority; propose as optional.

finding: README "Running workflows by tool" and ARCHITECTURE both point to index.md's "Running a workflow (by tool)" section, which exists and is correct - verified. No fix needed; recorded as a positive check.
